# Vatican Sayings

*[Epicurus](../philosophers/epicurus.md) · 300 BCE*

An anthology of eighty Epicurean maxims rediscovered in a Vatican manuscript, supplementing the Principal Doctrines. Several stress the value of friendship and the frugality that makes pleasure accessible to all.
